name: Moody AFB
profile: Military-friendly Moody AFB housing snapshot anchored to Valdosta / Lowndes County, built for PCSUnited base-level market overviews.

mortgage_assumptions.defaults_note: Based on March 2026 Georgia VA loan rates.

notes: Property taxes and insurance materially affect true monthly ownership cost near Moody.
Insurance and HOA should be included in all-in housing cost comparisons.

avg_home_mortgage_monthly.notes: VA loan estimate; very high affordability compared to national average

crime_status.installation: High security; gated military community. Extremely safe.
crime_status.metro_valdosta: Valdosta has localized property crime in central city areas; suburban North Lowndes and Hahira are exceptionally safe.

school_quality.on_base: None; students attend Lowndes County or Valdosta City Schools.
school_quality.off_base: Lowndes County Schools (specifically Hahira) are highly rated and preferred by military families.

rental_vacancy.notes: Healthy supply; many affordable single-family rentals in North Valdosta.

rental_metrics.notes: Healthy supply; many affordable single-family rentals in North Valdosta.

special_events: Thunder Over South Georgia Air Show

military_lifestyle_fit.description: True Southern hospitality; Valdosta is a classic military town with deep ties to the A-10 mission.

financial_brief.affordability_summary: Low entry costs and steady demand make this an ideal market for first-time buyers.
financial_brief.buyer_opportunity: Hahira and Northern Lowndes County offer the best long-term resale stability.

market_bluf.bluf_summary: Steady demand and low inventory in prime school districts keep values stable.

summary_points: Moody Air Force Base sits in the Valdosta / Lowndes County housing market with base-specific affordability, commute, and neighborhood tradeoffs.
Current market trend is approximately 1.2% year-over-year, which should shape buyer leverage and pricing discipline.
Low entry costs and steady demand make this an ideal market for first-time buyers.
Neighborhood quality varies across Valdosta, Lake Park, Hahira corridor and other nearby corridors — citywide averages should not be the only filter.
Steady demand and low inventory in prime school districts keep values stable.
opportunities: Moody military demand can support durable housing relevance for disciplined buyers and landlords.
Local inventory and pricing may offer opportunity for households that stress-test taxes, insurance, and commute together.
Valdosta and nearby corridors may offer stronger family or value positioning depending on assignment length.
Assignment-length clarity can improve rent-versus-buy decisions near Moody.
risks: Neighborhood quality, schools, commute, and monthly carrying costs vary across the Valdosta / Lowndes County market.
Property taxes, insurance, HOA, and utilities can widen the gap between list price and true monthly payment.
Market averages can hide weak submarkets — property-level review matters.
Some BAH profiles may be better served by renting than buying in this market.
buyer_notes: Moody buyers should compare all-in monthly cost, not just principal and interest.
Verify school zones, commute timing, and BAH fit by exact address before signing.
Hahira and Northern Lowndes County offer the best long-term resale stability.
This market rewards disciplined buyers who test the commute during expected report hours.
seller_notes: Sellers should price against current inventory and days on market rather than older peak assumptions.
Move-in-ready presentation and realistic pricing matter when buyers have leverage.
Military-adjacent commute convenience can be a listing strength if framed clearly.
investor_angles: Military turnover near Moody can support rental demand, but vacancy and maintenance should be modeled conservatively.
Investors should underwrite taxes, insurance, HOA, and property condition — not just acquisition price.
Practical commute corridors often outperform generic metro averages for military renter demand.
buyer_guidance: Use all-in monthly payment as the primary screen.
Compare taxes, insurance, commute, school quality, and resale flexibility before locking a neighborhood.
Do not choose housing based only on distance to Moody.
A slightly lower purchase price can materially improve monthly PCS flexibility.
seller_guidance: Price against active inventory and days on market.
Condition and presentation matter when buyers can compare more options.
Military commute convenience can help positioning if described accurately.
landlord_notes: Military renter demand can improve occupancy durability near Moody.
Model vacancy, repairs, insurance, and turnover conservatively.
Stable spread matters more than headline affordability alone.

base_profile.installation_type: Rescue / Close Air Support / Mission Support
base_profile.primary_mission_summary: Moody AFB supports rescue and A-10 close air support missions in south Georgia with classic military-town housing dynamics.
base_profile.pcs_personality: True Southern hospitality; Valdosta is a classic military town with deep ties to the A-10 mission.
base_profile.base_bluf: Steady demand and low inventory in prime school districts keep values stable.

user_positioning.military_family_bluf: Prioritize school-zone verification, BAH fit, commute testing, childcare access, and total monthly housing cost before signing near Moody.
user_positioning.single_airman_bluf: Prioritize commute simplicity, affordability, rental flexibility, and access to daily services around Valdosta.
user_positioning.realtor_bluf: Lead with BAH realism, commute risk, school-zone confidence, and all-in payment math for Moody clients — not generic Valdosta / Lowndes County stats alone.
user_positioning.investor_bluf: Rental demand near Moody is influenced by PCS turnover, training/permanent-party mix, and practical commute corridors.

gate_selection_logic: Start with the user's likely duty location.
Identify the most realistic primary gate.
Compare the commute during the user's actual report window.
Do not choose a neighborhood based only on mileage.
commute_intelligence.user_instruction: Before signing a lease or contract, test the commute from the exact property address to the expected gate during the same time window you would normally report to work.

bah_market_reality.bah_bluf: Moody housing decisions should compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, debt, and commute. BAH is a decision filter, not a promise of affordability.
recommended_calculations: BAH with dependents vs estimated rent
BAH without dependents vs estimated rent
Total housing cost vs 30% income lane
Residual monthly income after expenses and housing
bah_market_reality.base_tab_message: Show BAH as a decision filter for Moody, not a promise of affordability. Push users into PCSUnited financial calculators when the housing gap looks tight.

family_readiness.family_bluf: Families PCSing to Moody should verify school zones, childcare options, medical access, commute reality, and housing availability before choosing a neighborhood.

school_guidance.school_zone_warning: Always verify school assignment by exact address before signing a lease or purchase contract.
school_guidance.nearby_school_district_note: Lowndes County Schools (specifically Hahira) are highly rated and preferred by military families.
school_guidance.school_liaison_note: Use official school liaison resources where available for military school transition support.

childcare_guidance.cdc_note: Child Development Center availability, waitlists, and eligibility should be verified directly with official base resources.
childcare_guidance.youth_program_note: Youth programs and school-age care can materially affect family housing decisions.

medical_guidance.primary_medical_anchor: Moody Air Force Base medical services
medical_guidance.medical_warning: Verify clinic availability, pharmacy procedures, and emergency care options directly with official medical sources.

family_readiness.spouse_employment_note: The broader Valdosta / Lowndes County metro may offer spouse employment options, but commute, childcare, and credentialing should be considered together.

before_arrival: Verify official gate and Visitor Control Center hours.
Confirm sponsor contact and unit reporting instructions.
Confirm lodging or temporary housing plan.
Review housing office guidance before signing any lease or purchase contract.
Compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, and debt.

Verify school zones by exact property address.
first_week: Visit or contact the housing office if still deciding between on-base and off-base options.
Drive the commute from target neighborhoods during expected report time.
Tour properties before committing when possible.
first_30_days: Finalize housing only after comparing commute, BAH fit, school zones, and total monthly cost.
Save emergency, medical, gate, and housing office contact information.
Update PCSUnited profile and financial readiness dashboard with final housing numbers.

pcs_watchouts.title: Gate hours can change

pcs_watchouts.title: Distance is not the same as commute
pcs_watchouts.message: Neighborhoods should be compared by realistic gate access and traffic timing.

pcs_watchouts.title: School zones are address-specific
pcs_watchouts.message: Never assume a school assignment from neighborhood name alone.

pcs_watchouts.title: BAH is not the full affordability picture
pcs_watchouts.message: Users must compare rent or mortgage against income, debt, expenses, utilities, and savings goals.

pcs_watchouts.title: Property taxes and insurance shape true payment
pcs_watchouts.message: In this market, taxes (~0.92%) and insurance assumptions must be included in all-in comparisons.

Users should verify gate hours, access requirements, medical services, housing availability, school zones, and official procedures directly with the installation or official service provider before travel, lease signing, or home purchase.

parser_notes: This Moody AFB file was upgraded to the Lackland-style PCSUnited schema with slug, name, state_code, profile, market_metrics, metrics, ownership_costs, costs, rental_metrics, summary_points, risks, opportunities, buyer_notes, seller_notes, investor_angles, and guidance arrays.
Valdosta / Lowndes County is preserved as the surrounding metro/submarket context; base-specific market data was retained.
property_tax_rate and insurance_rate are normalized to decimal form for deterministic math, with percent aliases preserved for display compatibility.

This file now includes base_profile for the PCSUnited Base tab, including gate orientation, visitor control center, major services, on-base housing, recommended nearby neighborhoods, commute intelligence, BAH market guidance, PCS watchouts, and source notes.
